name: GlyphLang
script_text:
**GlyphLang: An AI-Optimized Programming Language**

GlyphLang is a backend programming language designed from the ground up to be efficient for AI generation. By minimizing boilerplate, built-in server and database support, and a consistent syntax, GlyphLang reduces token usage by 23% compared to FastAPI. The strict type system and opinionated design enable production-ready APIs with fewer files and less maintenance. With first-class CLI, LSP, and VS Code support, GlyphLang is a great fit for developers building AI-powered APIs and internal tools who want to lower their LLM costs and ship faster.

name: neurolink
script_text:
NeuroLink is the universal AI development platform that unifies access to 12 major providers and over 100 models. Built for enterprise-grade AI integration, it provides a consistent API, production-ready tooling, and an opinionated factory architecture. 

With NeuroLink, you can switch between AI providers with a single parameter change, leverage 64+ built-in tools and MCP servers, and deploy with confidence using features like Redis memory and multi-provider failover. The platform is available as both a TypeScript SDK and a professional CLI, empowering teams to build, test, and deploy AI applications quickly.

Whether you're working with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or any other supported provider, NeuroLink gives you a single, powerful interface to integrate AI into your applications.
